mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_FOODHIS_TRAN( USER_UUID, EAT_DATE, EAT_TYPE, MEAL_TYPE, PREDICTED_IMAGE_PATH, REG_DTM, MOD_DTM ) VALUES( #{userUuid}, #{eatDate}, #{eatType}, #{mealType}, #{predictedImagePath}, sysdate(), sysdate() )

INSERT INTO T_FOOD_TRAN( FOODHIS_SEQ, EAT_AMOUNT, FOOD_IMAGEPATH, FOOD_ID, FOOD_NAME, KEY_NAME, CALCIUM, CALORIES, CARBONHYDRATE, CHOLESTEROL, CUSTOM_FOOD_INFO, DIETRAYFIBER, FAT, FOOD_TYPE, PROTEIN, RAW_CALORIES, RAW_TOTAL_GRAM, SATURATEDFAT, SODIUM, SUGAR, TOTAL_GRAM, TRANSFAT, UNIT, VITAMINA, VITAMINB, VITAMINC, VITAMIND, VITAMINE ) VALUES( #{foodhisSeq}, #{eatAmount}, #{foodImagepath}, #{foodId}, #{foodName}, #{keyName}, #{calcium}, #{calories}, #{carbonhydrate}, #{cholesterol}, #{customFoodInfo}, #{dietrayfiber}, #{fat}, #{foodType}, #{protein}, #{rawCalories}, #{rawTotalGram}, #{saturatedfat}, #{sodium}, #{sugar}, #{totalGram}, #{transfat}, #{unit}, #{vitamina}, #{vitaminb}, #{vitaminc}, #{vitamind}, #{vitamine} )
mapper.select: SELECT T1.FOODHIS_SEQ AS foodhisSeq, T2.PREDICTED_IMAGE_PATH AS imagePath, MAX(T1.FOOD_NAME) AS foodName, CONCAT(CASE WHEN HOUR(T2.REG_DTM) < 12 THEN '오전' ELSE '오후' END,' ',DATE_FORMAT(T2.REG_DTM, '%h:%i')) AS regDtm, CAST(T2.TOTAL_CALORIES AS UNSIGNED) AS totalCalories, CAST(T2.carbonhydrate AS UNSIGNED) AS carbonhydrate, CAST(T2.protein AS UNSIGNED) AS protein, CAST(T2.fat AS UNSIGNED) AS fat FROM T_FOOD_TRAN T1 JOIN ( SELECT A.FOODHIS_SEQ, B.REG_DTM, B.PREDICTED_IMAGE_PATH, SUM(A.CALORIES) AS TOTAL_CALORIES, SUM(A.carbonhydrate) AS carbonhydrate, SUM(A.protein) AS protein, SUM(A.fat) AS fat FROM T_FOOD_TRAN A LEFT JOIN T_FOODHIS_TRAN B ON A.FOODHIS_SEQ = B.FOODHIS_SEQ WHERE A.FOODHIS_SEQ IN ( SELECT FOODHIS_SEQ FROM T_FOODHIS_TRAN WHERE DATE(REG_DTM) = #{regDtm} AND USER_UUID = #{userUuid} ) GROUP BY A.FOODHIS_SEQ,B.REG_DTM ) T2 ON T1.FOODHIS_SEQ = T2.FOODHIS_SEQ WHERE T1.FOODHIS_SEQ = T2.FOODHIS_SEQ AND T1.FOOD_IMAGEPATH IS NOT NULL AND T1.FOOD_NAME != '음식아님' GROUP BY T1.FOODHIS_SEQ,T2.PREDICTED_IMAGE_PATH
